prerequisites.value: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Proficiency, Shield Slam, Two-Weapon Fighting, base attack bonus +11.

description.value: **Benefit:** You do not suffer any Two-Weapon Fighting penalties on attack rolls made with a shield while you are wielding another weapon. Add your shieldâs enhancement bonus to attack and damage rolls made with the shield as if it were a weapon enhancement bonus. Editor’s Note This only applies to Two-Weapon Fighting since FAQ, originally applied to all penalties.
